summary: Worker fully completed the verification-only feature. All three requirements met: (1) 348 tests passing with exit 0, (2) kernel builds with exit 0 (31 pre-existing dead_code warnings), (3) Miri viability thoroughly assessed — 330/348 tests pass clean across 15 files, buddy failure is Miri provenance limitation (not UB), ipc failure is real UB in libraries/ipc (out of kernel scope). No code changes were made, which is correct for this feature type. Worker went beyond the minimum by running Miri on all 18 test files individually rather than just capturing head-100 output, producing a complete compatibility map. Three discovered issues (IPC UB, buddy Miri limitation, scheduler_state Miri performance) are well-documented and correctly scoped as non-blocking.

assertionResults.evidence: Handoff documents `cd system/test && cargo test -- --test-threads=1` with exit code 0 and 348 tests passing across 18 test files (asid:7, buddy:2, channel:18, device_tree:15, drawing:83, eevdf:28, executable:17, futex:11, handle:32, heap:1, heap_routing:2, ipc:24, sched_context:17, scheduler_state:20, slab:22, vma:21, waitable:20, virtqueue:8). Per-file breakdown sums to 348.
Handoff documents `cd system && cargo build` with exit code 0. 31 pre-existing dead_code warnings noted (not errors). Output shows 'Finished dev profile'.

Miri installed (nightly-aarch64-apple-darwin), run on all 18 test files individually. 15 files (330 tests) pass clean. buddy test fails due to Miri provenance limitation with mmap-based memory simulation (not real UB). ipc test detects real UB: unaligned AtomicU32 reference at ipc/lib.rs:198 (in libraries/, out of kernel scope). Results thoroughly documented in handoff with per-file exit codes and observations.

sharedStateObservations.description: Worker correctly identified that the kernel-auditor skill's Step 8 (Commit) assumes every feature produces code changes. Verification-only features like this one should NOT commit. The skill should have guidance for read-only audit features that skip the commit step.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff skillFeedback.suggestedChanges: 'The kernel-auditor skill step 8 (Commit) doesn\'t account for verification-only features that should NOT make code changes.'

sharedStateObservations.description: The `miri` command in services.yaml runs all tests together, but Miri stops on the first failure (buddy). Worker discovered that running per-file (`cargo +nightly miri test --test <name>`) is the practical approach. The services.yaml miri command could note this limitation or provide a per-file variant.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Worker ran 18 individual `cargo +nightly miri test --test <name>` commands because the blanket miri command exits 101 on the buddy test, masking the 15 passing files and the real IPC UB finding.

sharedStateObservations.description: The Miri per-file results and performance characteristics (scheduler_state ~1400s) are valuable operational knowledge for future workers. While AGENTS.md was updated with a summary, a dedicated library entry for Miri compatibility details would make this more discoverable.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Worker spent significant effort running each file individually and documenting compatibility. scheduler_state Miri overhead (1400s vs <1s) is a practical concern for future Miri milestone work.
